---
title: "About"
---

**Stat et al.** is a cumulative statistics Q&A series — statistics, and
its co-authors. Each numbered entry asks one question, answers it from
first principles, and builds on everything that came before.

The series is written by a marketing PhD student relearning statistics
deliberately, from foundations through graduate level, and is aimed at
readers doing the same: PhD students in marketing and the social
sciences who want to understand *why* the methods work, not just how to
run them.

<!-- Add a short bio and a link to your personal site (amiochowdhury.com) here. -->
